summary: Iteration 7 - Enterprise Map Bridge View Enhancement: All bridge view features tested and working. View mode switching, bridge station hotspots, labels toggle, station detail modals, and cross-section location navigation all functional.
passed_tests: Enterprise Map page loads correctly via nav-enterprise
Exterior view (AUSSENANSICHT) shows HD Enterprise image
Cross-section view (QUERSCHNITT) shows 8 interactive location hotspots
Location hotspots have ticket count badges
Clicking location hotspot navigates to location detail page
Back button on location detail returns to Enterprise map
Bridge view (BRUECKENANSICHT) loads with bridge background image
All 7 bridge station hotspots present: CONN, OPS, TACTICAL, ENGINEERING, SCIENCE, CAPTAIN, VIEWSCREEN
Bridge stations have hover effects and visual borders
Labels toggle button shows 'STATIONEN ANZEIGEN' initially
Clicking labels toggle changes text to 'LABELS AUSBLENDEN'
Labels toggle shows station names on bridge hotspots
Clicking CONN station opens detail modal
Station modal shows station name (CONN) with icon
Station modal shows FUNKTION section with description
Station modal shows OFFIZIER section with officer name
Station modal has SCHLIESSEN button
SCHLIESSEN button closes modal correctly
All 7 station modals work (CONN, OPS, TACTICAL, ENGINEERING, SCIENCE, CAPTAIN, VIEWSCREEN)
AKTUELLE ANLIEGEN ticket summary panel shows on bridge view (right side)
View mode switching triggers warp transition animation
All German text labels correct (AUSSENANSICHT, QUERSCHNITT, BRUECKENANSICHT)
critical_code_review_comments: Bridge stations are implemented well with hover effects, icons, and proper modals
All data-testid attributes present for testability
Warp transition animation enhances UX when switching views
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise Map page has 3 views: Exterior, Cross-Section, and Bridge. Bridge view has 7 interactive station hotspots with detail modals. Login is done by clicking role cards (no password input needed). Splash screen takes 5-8 seconds on first load - wait for it or check sessionStorage.
